Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Pilgrim]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — A Pilgrim is a type of person that can be taken into custody.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Andel is a Pilgrim.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Pilgrims recite an incantation when they suspect a spawn of the Creeping Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Pilgrim is a man in white robes who carries a copy of Meditations on the Unknown God.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Pilgrim wears a White Sun medallion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Pilgrim addresses Darius as Knight-Adjunct.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Foster called for a Pilgrim he could trust.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Pilgrims of the Luminian Order must serve the Guild for years, oppose Elders, and heal people with alchemy and medical skill to possess Soulbound power.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Shera orders the Reader to be taken to a Pilgrim.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
